proved_statements: Primitive profiles and frame-specific verdicts factor uniquely through certified representation-equivalence quotients.
The intersection-of-classifier-kernels quotient is the coarsest finite carrier retaining every declared frame output.
No common top-label quotient can commute on both the access-only and mechanism-change witnesses while preserving N's Access/Capability distinction.
Material construction forks remain indexed absent an explicit commuting transport.
nonclaims: No new physical capability or universal hierarchy is proved.
No source repository claim or status moves.
C1 task semantics and the persistence cap remain binding.
The finite augmented-dynamics example does not rule out a later canonical universal construction.
